title: ENOKING Magnetic Knife Block Without Knives – Double Sided Magnetic Knife Holder & Stand,Acacia Wood Knife Storage Rack for Cutlery – Natural Wooden Knife Organiser,Quick-Fit Design
features: Dual-Sided Magnetic Knife Block Without Knives – Space-Saving Kitchen Essential Maximise countertop space with ENOKING’s double-sided magnetic knife block, designed for UK-sized kitchens. Store 12+ knives (chef knives, Santoku, steak knives) while displaying blades safely. Compact 26x23.5cm footprint organises scissors, sharpeners, and kitchen tools, transforming cluttered counters into minimalist workspaces.

Military-Grade Magnetic Grip – No Slip, No Wobble Engineered with enhanced neodymium magnet bars (3x stronger than standard holders), this magnetic knife holder locks blades in place – even 30cm cleavers. Wide magnetic coverage secures irregularly shaped tools ( shears) vertically without sliding.

Acacia Wood Magnetic Knife Rack – Beauty Meets Durability Crafted from solid acacia hardwood , this knife block magnetic storage resists warping in humid British kitchens. The oil-finished surface prevents blade nicks and dulling, while its grain texture adds rustic charm to modern or farmhouse kitchens. Wipe clean with a damp cloth – no harsh chemicals needed.

Sturdy Non-Slip Base & Tool-Free 3-Screw Setup Designed for UK kitchens, this magnetic knife stand features a widened base with industrial silicone anti-slip pads that grip granite, laminate, or marble surfaces. The self-tapping screws (included) need no drills – align pre-drilled holes, hand-tighten clockwise, and organise knives instantly. Perfect for rentals or cluttered workspaces, knife organiser stays stable during heavy use.
Breathable Design for UK Climates – Low Maintenance Natural wood grain allows airflow to prevent moisture buildup – a must for British homes. Avoid direct sunlight/dampness to preserve integrity.

24/7 Customer Support &Assured Purchase Confidence Every ENOKING knife storage ships in reinforced packaging to ensure your item arrives in pristine condition. Should you have any queries, our ENOKING support team is ready to assist via Amazon Messages. We prioritise swift, practical solutions tailored to your needs.
description: Product Description Powerful Double-Side Magnet/Acacia Wood ENOKING Acacia Wood Magnetic Knife Block We built enhanced black magnetic stripes in the knife block to absorb the metal knives, this is a creative and amazing design for space save in kitchen. We select high-grade natural acacia wood to produce the knife block, it is the symbol of durability and solidity, with a beautiful pattern texture that complements any kitchen.
